title: Fist Language
description: A font pack to change letters to symbols that no one else will understand unless they have a deciphering code in the description.
body:
The deciphering code: https://bellathegodgamerhub.hi.link/
Click link -> Click deciphering code -> /Scroll up or down possibly/

Note: This texture pack only changes non-accented Latin characters.

You **MAY** use this in your video, **no credit required**, but it would be **appreciated**.

Join my Discord community channel: https://discord.com/invite/zpVxej6QVe
